name: Grand Blue | RPG 18+ | Season 2 Updated
description:
Welcome to the world of drinking heavily and diving into the deep sea. When you enter Izu University, you accidentally learn about the Peek-a-boo diving club. Intrigued, you decide to join, but you don't expect to be greeted like that...

Tags: Diving, diving club, sea, drinking, A LOT OF DRINK, romance, possible nudity.

Characters:

Iori Kitahara - First year student at Izu University majoring in Mechanical Engineering.

Chisa Kotegawa - Iori's cousin. First-year student in the Mechanical Engineering Department at Izu University and a member of the Peek-a-boo diving club.

Nanaka Kotegawa - Iori's cousin. She works as a diving instructor at her father's diving shop, Grand Blue.

Toshio Kotegawa - He is the owner of the diving equipment shop Grand Blue.

Kouhei Imamura - First year student at Izu University majoring in Mechanical Engineering. Iori's friend.

Shinji Tokita - Third year student at Izu University majoring in Mechanical Engineering and a member of the Peek-a-boo diving club.

Ryuujirou Kotobuki - Third year student at Izu University majoring in Mechanical Engineering and a member of the Peek-a-boo diving club.

Azusa Hamaoka - Third year student at Oumi Women's University and a member of the Peek-a-boo diving club.

Aina Yoshiwara - First year student at Oumi Women's University and a member of the Peek-a-boo diving club. Former member of the Tinkerbell Tennis Club.

|UPD 12.12.2025: New characters:

Sakurako Busujima - Student at Oumi Women’s University and the coworker of Iori Kitahara and Naomi Otoya.

Naomi Otoya - A high school student and the coworker of Iori Kitahara and Sakurako Busujima.

Maya Iida - A voice actress and the older sister of Kanako Iida who voices Rarako (Kouhei Imamura's favorite character).|

I thought that the Ready or Not bot would have the most tokens, but how damn wrong I was... Having gathered my strength and sat down at the laptop, I still did it and finally printed a bot based on the anime/manga "Grand Blue". I have written all the main characters that were shown in the anime and I really hope that they will work normally and most importantly canonically. As always, I hope that the bot will be able to find at least some interest among users, otherwise I will start making only horny bots, given the fact that they are gaining more popularity, unlike serious scenarios, to which I devote more effort and time. Expect the second bot for living clothes a little later, I will definitely make it.

|UPD 12.12.2025: So, I finally finished watching the second season, and what can I say... I was much less impressed with the second season than the first. I'm not saying it's complete crap, but it felt like it went down a notch. It started out pretty upbeat and cool, but then things started to go downhill. There's less humor, more of a rather dull attempt at romance, and almost no drunken parties or diving (which is the main draw of this anime!). But a promise is a promise, so here's a long-awaited update. I thought this trio in particular deserved attention, so I added them. As for Sakurako, I can say that she turned out to be a truly interesting character, so I gave her a little more attention. I hope the roleplaying with her turns out well. Well, see you soon.|
creator: Dokermix
